used_sources.role: Daily transit calls and capacity for Hormuz + 28 chokepoints worldwide.
HORMUZ-26 and RED SEA TENSIONS disruption markers.
Monthly tanker export volumes from Gulf ports for flow map.
Daily Brent crude and jet fuel spot prices.
Lat/lon of all 28 chokepoints for the world map.
Context facts about Hormuz oil flows.

v5_additions.hormuz_origin_flows.csv: Derived from cleaned EIA figure data; 2024 crude/condensate flow by origin country/label through Hormuz.
v5_additions.hormuz_destination_flows.csv: Derived from cleaned EIA figure data; 2024 crude/condensate flow by destination country/label after Hormuz.
v5_additions.fuel_price_decomposition.csv: Derived from uploaded fuel_prices_nov25-may26.xlsx sheet Διαμόρφωση Τιμής.
v5_additions.greece_nomos_centroids.csv: Approximate prefecture centroids used as fallback/focus points for the Greece map.
